config_notes: Initial config based on Acton Zoning Bylaw 2023. Confidence moderate — key ADU rules require verification against current bylaw text.

ma_adu_by_right.description: All single-family and two-family zoned parcels must permit at least one ADU by right regardless of local prohibition. Studio/1BR ADU ≤ 900 sqft or half principal unit size.
ma_adu_by_right.notes: Verify applicability with local counsel. MBTA Communities Act compliance may add additional requirements.

parcel_data.notes: MassGIS L3 standardized parcel layer. Download town layer for Acton.

zoning_data.notes: Acton Zoning Bylaw PDF. Zoning district boundaries may need manual GIS join.

assessor_data.notes: Assessor attributes included in MassGIS L3 parcel layer.

sewer_service_notes: Acton is not served by municipal sewer. All parcels must rely on private septic systems. Any new bedroom requires Title 5 compliance.

R-2.label: Residential 2-Acre
R-2.adu_notes: Accessory structures allowed by right under Table of Uses. Detached accessory dwelling units subject to Planning Board site plan review for units over 750 sqft.

R-4.label: Residential 4-Acre
R-4.adu_notes: ADU not explicitly addressed in R-4 district. Assumed not permitted without variance or special permit. Requires manual legal verification.

R-8.label: Residential 8-Acre
R-8.adu_notes: Large lot rural zone. ADU not addressed. Very low feasibility for accessory structures given lot coverage and setback requirements.

VR.label: Village Residential
VR.adu_notes: Village Residential zone is the most permissive for accessory structures. Smaller lots but higher coverage allowance. Best zone for Plinth deployment.

septic_assumptions.notes: Massachusetts Title 5 governs all private septic systems. New system or expansion requires passing soil evaluation and perc test. Assumption: existing system on a parcel cannot support additional bedrooms without upgrade unless lot is large enough for a second system area.

parking_assumptions.notes: One off-street space assumed required per accessory unit unless district config specifies otherwise.

overlays.label: FEMA Flood Zone AE
overlays.notes: No new accessory structures in AE zone per FEMA floodplain management requirements.

overlays.label: Wetlands Buffer (100ft)
overlays.notes: Massachusetts Wetlands Protection Act prohibits new construction within 100ft of wetlands without Order of Conditions.

overlays.label: South Acton Historic District
overlays.notes: Historic District Commission review required. Not an automatic disqualifier but adds time and uncertainty.

overlays.label: Aquifer Protection District
overlays.notes: Additional review for new impervious surfaces. May affect septic system siting.
